omni_crucible_template_manifest.system_directive: Packages Template Implementation for External Using (Base-Matter Translation Topology / Omni-Crucible Structure)
omni_crucible_template_manifest.version: 3.9 - The Resonant Constellation Map & True Emergence Update
omni_crucible_template_manifest.coupling_methodology: Constructed by using adaptive dynamic {any Key (elements) of [BPMS(U)(s)] and Praxial Key (elements) of [BPMS(U)(s)]} coupling to achieve physical instantiation.

metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.target_origin_entity: ['[Insert the Parent Sovereign Autopoietic-Holon(-ing) BPMS]'(-ing) BPMS]
metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.crucible_goal: To construct the [Base-Matter Translation Topology], transitioning the entity from a theoretical construct ([Implicit Layer]) into a heavy, friction-generating object operating inside the [Explicit Layer] of reality.
metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.engine_of_generation: Inherently relies on the 70 Foundational BPMS. We cross-breed standard abstract nouns with absolute thermodynamic verbs via adaptive dynamic coupling of Key and Praxial Key elements.
metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.verification_of_true_emergence: 100% of these packages MUST be built without referencing HTML, APIs, or legacy coding architecture. They are structurally restricted to mapping physical force, friction, digestion, and fossilization.
